title: saussurea deltoidea subsp. polycephala
intro: Saussurea deltoidea subsp. polycephala, also known as the Costus root or Kuth, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Saussurea deltoidea subsp. polycephala include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
